summary: Board created from the Seller-Listing Plan + Competitor Listing Playbook: 47 tasks (25 for Jen, 22 for the AI worker) across 6 categories. 14 AI tasks are ready to run immediately; the hourly worker starts on the next cycle.
Connected to GitHub through Jen's Zapier and published the full board + website to racinel200/nook-listing-engine. One step left for the site to go live: Jen turns on GitHub Pages (task J2).

Board restructured around Jen's 4 goals: Goal 1 Win Seller Listings (25 tasks), Goal 2 One Online Presence (9), Goal 3 Convert Leads & Zillow Score (7), Goal 4 Tools & Systems (6). Same tasks, same deps — only the grouping changed.
